text:
Zenju (ゼンジュ, Zenju) Hunter × Hunter Hunter Association Official Issue: Hunter's Guide; Character & World Official Databook (pg. 205) is a Greed Island player and a Hunter. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 16, Chapter 158 

Appearance

Zenju dresses in the typical robes of a Buddhist monk and wears large prayer beads around his neck. He has a bald head and thick eyebrows. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 13, Chapter 126 

Plot

Greed Island arc

Zenju was hired by Battera on the same day as Gon, Killua, and Biscuit, together with 17 other players. He, Sakisuke, and Puhat are astonished after Gon enters the game. 

When Gon, Killua, and Goreinu checked the list of players in Gon's binder, a bright dot was seen next to his name, signifying that he was alive and still playing the game. 

Abilities & Powers

Zenju is capable enough to have passed the notoriously difficult Hunter Exam. 

Nen

Due to being able to access Greed Island, Zenju is capable of utilizing Nen, Hunter × Hunter - Volume 13, Chapter 121 and it can be assumed that he is moderately skilled at it since he was approved by Tsezguerra. 

Manga Appearances

Trivia

Though Zenju's name is technically given in the manga through Gon's Greed Island binder and recognized by Goreinu, the correspondence between the character and his name is only provided in the Hunter's Guide databook.
